Custom Light Pole Banners for Outdoor Street & Construction Display

Durable Double-Sided Light Pole Banners for Street Marketing & Event Display

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (Height x Width) Quantity Material Options Production Time Design Method PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Light Pole Banners for Street & Construction Applications

Light pole banners are versatile and eye-catching displays perfect for advertising your business, event, or message on any street or sidewalk. Made from weather-resistant vinyl materials, these banners withstand harsh outdoor conditions and provide years of reliable service.

Our light pole banners excel for holiday or seasonal events, school homecoming celebrations, sharing town slogans, or helping businesses attract potential customers with prominent street-side displays.

All light pole banners feature double-sided printing with reinforced pole pockets at top and bottom, designed specifically for mounting on light poles using professional bracket systems.

Vinyl Materials for Outdoor Light Pole Banner Durability

Your light pole banner uses premium materials and state-of-the-art large format printing for vibrant colors that capture attention. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA for superior quality assurance.

Please note that exact banner sizes cannot be guaranteed due to vinyl's temperature-sensitive nature. Heat application during printing, finishing, and outdoor climate variations can cause material fluctuation. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (example: a 5' banner could finish with up to 2.5" variance). For precise-fit applications, please discuss your specific requirements with our Customer Service team.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Light Pole Banners Our high-quality 13oz matte vinyl banner material offers excellent durability with low shine finish and rich color reproduction, making it our most popular choice for outdoor light pole displays.
18 oz Vinyl Light Pole Banners Our extra heavy-duty 18oz vinyl banner material provides maximum durability with low luster finish and blockout coating for superior weather resistance and print quality.

Finishing & Mounting Options for Light Pole Banner Installation

• Maximum print size: 72" height × 36" width

• All light pole banners include double-sided printing with reinforced pole pockets top and bottom

• Two professional hardware systems available: Standard Bracket System (recommended for sizes up to 24") and Wind Deflecting Bracket System (recommended for larger sizes)

Light pole banners work exclusively with adjustable mounting hardware. Most commercial banner hardware offers adjustability, and we strongly recommend against using non-adjustable or stationary hardware systems. During the printing process, banners undergo heating and cooling cycles that may cause material expansion or contraction, preventing exact fit guarantees with rigid mounting systems.

Request a material sample packet to evaluate options for your project.

Need Additional Support?

Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 and our representatives will provide detailed assistance for your light pole banner project.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Light Pole Banner Materials for Weather Resistance

Choose from two professional-grade vinyl materials specifically engineered for outdoor light pole banner applications. Both options deliver exceptional durability and color vibrancy for long-lasting street-side displays.

13 oz Matte Vinyl for Light Pole Banners

Our most popular light pole banner material features:

  • Low-shine matte finish reduces glare and reflections
  • Rich color gamut for vibrant graphics
  • Excellent weather resistance for outdoor installations
  • Optimal weight balance for wind resistance

18 oz Heavy-Duty Vinyl for Light Pole Banners

Our premium heavy-duty material provides:

  • Maximum durability for high-traffic areas
  • Blockout coating prevents light bleed-through
  • Superior print quality and color saturation
  • Enhanced tear resistance for windy conditions

All light pole banner materials are manufactured in the USA using environmentally responsible processes and meet commercial outdoor display standards.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Light Pole Banner Finishing for Professional Installation

Every light pole banner includes professional finishing options designed for secure mounting and long-term outdoor performance.

Double-Sided Printing

All light pole banners feature full-color printing on both sides, ensuring your message remains visible from any viewing angle on busy streets and sidewalks.

Reinforced Pole Pockets

Professional pole pockets at top and bottom provide:

  • Secure mounting to standard bracket hardware
  • Reinforced stitching for wind resistance
  • Proper banner tension and display positioning
  • Long-term durability under outdoor conditions

Hardware Compatibility

Light pole banners are specifically designed for adjustable mounting systems:

  • Standard Bracket System: Recommended for banners up to 24" width
  • Wind Deflecting Bracket System: Required for larger sizes and high-wind areas

Professional adjustable hardware accommodates material expansion and contraction, ensuring proper fit throughout changing weather conditions.

Light Pole Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Select from flexible production timeframes that match your project schedule. Our production times range from express 2-day service to economical 5-day turnaround, giving you complete control over your light pole banner delivery.

2 Business Days Express Production

Perfect when you need light pole banners quickly but have an extra day for planning.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases
  • Total delivery time includes production plus shipping time
  • Turnaround begins when file upload completes or proof approval is received

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular fast turnaround option - free production with excellent speed for most custom light pole banner projects.

  • Ideal balance of speed and convenience
  • No additional rush charges
  • Sufficient time for quality control and finishing
  • Compatible with most shipping options

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose extended production time to reduce costs without compromising quality on your light pole banner order.

  • Cost savings for non-urgent projects
  • Same high-quality materials and printing
  • Ideal for advance planning and bulk orders
  • Allows time for comprehensive quality assurance

Production Notes: Orders received after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the next business day. Emergency rush service may be available - contact customer service for availability and pricing.

Payment Options for Custom Light Pole Banner Orders

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received and cleared before production begins
  • Electronic Payments: Available for qualifying business accounts

Payment Processing

Your credit card will not be charged until you approve your light pole banner order. This ensures you have complete control over your project specifications and pricing before any charges occur.

For check payments, review our detailed check payment process to ensure smooth order processing.

Business Account Options

Qualifying businesses may be eligible for extended payment terms and volume pricing. Contact our customer service team to discuss business account benefits for recurring light pole banner orders.

Shipping Guidelines for Light Pole Banner Delivery

For shipping questions, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your light pole banner order. Unless specified otherwise, orders ship via UPS Ground with 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States.

Shipping Confirmation & Tracking

You'll receive a tracking number immediately when your light pole banner ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress in real-time.

Shipping Costs & Policies

  • Pricing determined by package weight and destination
  • Additional charges apply to oversized light pole banner orders
  • Shipping company terms apply after package handoff
  • No refunds for carrier delays beyond our control
  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement processing
  • Lost packages replaced after carrier confirms loss (7-10 business days)

Regional Production & Shipping Maps

Vinyl Light Pole Banners: Produced at our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities based on optimal customer location and specifications.

Fabric Light Pole Banners: Manufactured exclusively at our Minnesota facility.

Available Shipping Methods

Standard Ground (3-5 Business Days)
Three Day Select (3 Business Days)
Two Day Express (2 Business Days)
Next Day Air (1 Business Day)
UPS Next Day Air AM (Morning Delivery)

International Shipping

International light pole banner shipments require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact our team for detailed international shipping requirements.

Economy Shipping Notes

When selecting economy shipping, include complete address details (including P.O. Box information in "Address Two" field) to ensure successful delivery. Economy shipping may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination.

Installation Options for Light Pole Banner Setup

Professional installation ensures your light pole banners deliver maximum impact and longevity. Choose the appropriate hardware system based on your banner size and local wind conditions.

Wind Deflecting Hardware Installation Guide

Recommended for light pole banners larger than 24" or installations in high-wind areas. This system allows controlled banner movement, reducing stress and extending banner life.

Standard Hardware Installation Guide

Suitable for light pole banners up to 24" width in moderate wind conditions. Provides secure mounting with basic adjustability for proper banner tension.

Installation Best Practices

  • Use only adjustable mounting hardware systems
  • Allow for material expansion/contraction with weather changes
  • Ensure proper bracket spacing matches your banner's pole pocket dimensions
  • Regular inspection and maintenance extends banner lifespan

Hardware Selection Guide

Choose your mounting system based on:

  • Banner Size: Standard hardware for up to 24", Wind Deflecting for larger banners
  • Wind Conditions: High-wind areas require Wind Deflecting hardware
  • Display Duration: Long-term displays benefit from Wind Deflecting systems
  • Traffic Exposure: Busy areas may require more robust Wind Deflecting hardware

For detailed installation instructions and hardware selection assistance, contact our customer service team who can provide project-specific recommendations.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Light Pole Banner Printing

Professional artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and color accuracy for your light pole banner project. Follow these specifications for best results.

Recommended File Formats

Vector-based files produce superior results:

  • .eps files with fonts converted to outlines (preferred)
  • High-resolution .pdf files (300 DPI minimum)
  • High-resolution .jpg files (300 DPI minimum)
  • .tiff files for photographic content

Light Pole Banner Design Specifications

For optimal display results:

  • Place text and critical imagery at least 1" from pole pocket areas
  • Account for double-sided printing in your design layout
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing text and graphics
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum street-side visibility

File Quality Assessment

If you're unsure about your file quality or resolution, our professional graphic designers will review your artwork and provide optimization recommendations to ensure your light pole banner prints with exceptional clarity.

Order Proofing for Light Pole Banner Accuracy

Request an order proof to verify all project details before production. Your proof includes:

  • Low-resolution artwork preview
  • Complete order summary with pricing
  • Billing and shipping information confirmation

Production begins only after you approve your proof, ensuring complete accuracy.

Color Matching for Critical Light Pole Banner Projects

For color-critical applications, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color representation for your specific project. Contact customer service for detailed color matching information and pricing.

Customize & Order Your Light Pole Banners Today

Transform your street presence with professional light pole banners that capture attention and deliver your message effectively. Whether promoting seasonal events, business services, or community initiatives, our durable double-sided banners provide the visibility you need.

Ready to create your custom light pole banners? Choose from our extensive template collection, upload your own design, or work with our professional design team to create the perfect street-side display.

Light Pole Banner Applications & Benefits

Light pole banners excel for versatile outdoor advertising and community messaging. Made from weather-resistant vinyl materials, these banners withstand harsh outdoor conditions while delivering years of reliable service.

Our light pole banners are perfect for:

All banners feature double-sided printing with reinforced pole pockets, designed specifically for professional bracket mounting systems. Available in 13 oz matte vinyl for standard applications or 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl for maximum durability.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are pole banners (light pole banners)?

Light pole banners are vertical display banners specifically designed for mounting on light poles using professional bracket hardware systems.

Where are your pole banners made?

All light pole banners are manufactured and printed in the USA at our professional production facilities.

What materials are available for pole banners?

We offer 13 oz matte vinyl and 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl materials, both engineered for outdoor light pole banner applications.

What's the difference between 13 oz matte vinyl and 18 oz vinyl?

13 oz matte vinyl offers excellent durability with low shine finish and rich color reproduction. 18 oz vinyl provides maximum durability with blockout coating for superior weather resistance.

What is the maximum size you can print for a pole banner?

Maximum light pole banner size is 72" height × 36" width.

Are pole banners printed single-sided or double-sided?

All light pole banners feature double-sided printing for visibility from any viewing angle.

Do pole banners include pole pockets?

Yes, all light pole banners include reinforced pole pockets at both top and bottom for secure hardware mounting.

Can you guarantee the exact finished size of my pole banner?

Exact sizes cannot be guaranteed because vinyl is temperature-sensitive and may fluctuate during printing, finishing, and with outdoor climate changes.

What is your acceptable size variance for pole banners?

Acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (example: a 5' banner could finish with up to 2.5" variance).

Will your pole banner fit my existing hardware?

Light pole banners are designed for adjustable hardware systems. We don't recommend non-adjustable or stationary hardware, and exact fit cannot be guaranteed with rigid mounting systems.

Which hardware should I use: Standard Bracket System or Wind Deflecting Bracket System?

Use Standard Bracket System for banners up to 24" width. Larger banners require Wind Deflecting Bracket System for proper performance.

What if I need a very precise fit?

For precise-fit applications, contact our Customer Service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss your specific project requirements and available options.
